title: Are AI labs pelicanmaxxing?
excerpt: Excellent piece of work by Dylan Castillo, who took a deep-dive into the frequently pondered question of whether the AI labs have been deliberately training models to draw pelicans riding …
content_html:
22nd July 2026 - Link Blog

Are AI labs pelicanmaxxing? (via) Excellent piece of work by Dylan Castillo, who took a deep-dive into the frequently pondered question of whether the AI labs have been deliberately training models to draw pelicans riding bicycles in response to my deeply unscientific benchmark.

I've been randomly spot-checking this in the past by testing models against other animals riding other types of vehicle, but never with anything close to the diligence of Dylan's methodology here.

Dylan took 8 animals × 6 vehicles = 48 prompts and ran them three times each through 7 different models ( GPT-5.6 Terra, Claude Sonnet 5, Gemini 3.5 Flash, Grok 4.5, Qwen3.7-Max, GLM-5.2, and DeepSeek V4 Pro). He then used GPT-5.6 Luna and Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite to help evaluate the results.

There's a neat filter view for exploring the results:

For the models he tested he could find no evidence of pelimaxxing:

  • The pelicans on bicycles don’t look any better
  • Labs are not better at drawing pelicans
  • Labs are not better at drawing bicycles
  • Labs are not better at drawing pelicans on bicycles, even adjusting for difficulty
  • The pelican-bicycle scenes don’t look memorized [...]

Pelicans aren’t drawn any better than other animals. Bicycles aren’t drawn any better than other vehicles. And no lab draws the combination better than its pelicans and bicycles already predict. GLM-5.2 comes closest: it has the largest boost on the exact pelican-bicycle cell, and and its first pelican-on-bicycle sample caught my eye. But the effect is small and not significant, so I wouldn’t put too much weight on it.

Dylan took 8 animals × 6 vehicles = 48 prompts and ran them three times each through 7 different models ( GPT-5.6 Terra, Claude Sonnet 5, Gemini 3.5 Flash, Grok 4.5, Qwen3.7-Max, GLM-5.2, and DeepSeek V4 Pro). He then used GPT-5.6 Luna and Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite to help evaluate the results. There's a neat filter view for exploring the results: For the models he tested he could find no evidence of pelimaxxing: The pelicans on bicycles don’t look any better Labs are not better at drawing pelicans Labs are not better at drawing bicycles Labs are not better at drawing pelicans on bicycles, even adjusting for difficulty The pelican-bicycle scenes don’t look memorized [...] Pelicans aren’t drawn any better than other animals. But the effect is small and not significant, so I wouldn’t put too much weight on it.

sentences.en: (via) Excellent piece of work by Dylan Castillo, who took a deep-dive into the frequently pondered question of whether the AI labs have been deliberately training models to draw pelicans riding bicycles in response to my deeply unscientific benchmark.
sentences.zh: （via）迪伦·卡斯蒂略（Dylan Castillo）的出色作品，他深入探讨了一个经常被思考的问题：人工智能实验室是否一直在刻意训练模型来绘制骑自行车的鹈鹕，以回应我非常不科学的基准。

blocks.html_en: Dylan took 8 animals × 6 vehicles = 48 prompts and ran them three times each through 7 different models ( GPT-5.6 Terra, Claude Sonnet 5, Gemini 3.5 Flash, Grok 4.5, Qwen3.7-Max, GLM-5.2, and DeepSeek V4 Pro). He then used GPT-5.6 Luna and Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite to help evaluate the results.

sentences.en: For the models he tested he could find no evidence of pelimaxxing:
sentences.zh: 对于他测试的模型，他找不到 Pelimaxxing 的证据：

blocks.html_en:
• The pelicans on bicycles don’t look any better
  • Labs are not better at drawing pelicans
  • Labs are not better at drawing bicycles
  • Labs are not better at drawing pelicans on bicycles, even adjusting for difficulty
  • The pelican-bicycle scenes don’t look memorized [...]

Pelicans aren’t drawn any better than other animals. Bicycles aren’t drawn any better than other vehicles. And no lab draws the combination better than its pelicans and bicycles already predict. GLM-5.2 comes closest: it has the largest boost on the exact pelican-bicycle cell, and and its first pelican-on-bicycle sample caught my eye. But the effect is small and not significant, so I wouldn’t put too much weight on it.

sentences.en: The pelicans on bicycles don’t look any better Labs are not better at drawing pelicans Labs are not better at drawing bicycles Labs are not better at drawing pelicans on bicycles, even adjusting for difficulty The pelican-bicycle scenes don’t look memorized [...]
sentences.zh: 自行车上的鹈鹕看起来并没有好多少 实验室并不擅长画鹈鹕 实验室并不擅长画自行车 实验室并不擅长画自行车上的鹈鹕，甚至根据难度进行调整 鹈鹕自行车场景看起来不被记住 [...]

sentences.en: Pelicans aren’t drawn any better than other animals.
sentences.zh: 鹈鹕的画法并不比其他动物好多少。

sentences.en: Bicycles aren’t drawn any better than other vehicles.
sentences.zh: 自行车并不比其他车辆更好。

sentences.en: And no lab draws the combination better than its pelicans and bicycles already predict.
sentences.zh: 没有哪个实验室得出的这种组合比鹈鹕和自行车已经预测的更好。

sentences.en: GLM-5.2 comes closest: it has the largest boost on the exact pelican-bicycle cell, and and its first pelican-on-bicycle sample caught my eye.
sentences.zh: GLM-5.2 最接近：它对鹈鹕自行车电池具有最大的增强作用，并且它的第一个鹈鹕自行车样本引起了我的注意。

sentences.en: But the effect is small and not significant, so I wouldn’t put too much weight on it.
sentences.zh: 但效果很小，也不显着，所以我不会太重视它。

blocks.html_en: • The pelicans on bicycles don’t look any better

sentences.en: The pelicans on bicycles don’t look any better
sentences.zh: 骑自行车的鹈鹕看起来也好不了多少

blocks.html_en: • Labs are not better at drawing pelicans

sentences.en: Labs are not better at drawing pelicans
sentences.zh: 实验室并不擅长画鹈鹕

blocks.html_en: • Labs are not better at drawing bicycles

sentences.en: Labs are not better at drawing bicycles
sentences.zh: 实验室并不擅长绘制自行车

blocks.html_en: • Labs are not better at drawing pelicans on bicycles, even adjusting for difficulty

sentences.en: Labs are not better at drawing pelicans on bicycles, even adjusting for difficulty
sentences.zh: 实验室并不擅长绘制骑自行车的鹈鹕，甚至根据难度进行调整

sentences.en: The pelican-bicycle scenes don’t look memorized [...]
sentences.zh: 鹈鹕自行车的场景看起来并没有被记住[...]

blocks.html_en: Pelicans aren’t drawn any better than other animals. Bicycles aren’t drawn any better than other vehicles. And no lab draws the combination better than its pelicans and bicycles already predict. GLM-5.2 comes closest: it has the largest boost on the exact pelican-bicycle cell, and and its first pelican-on-bicycle sample caught my eye. But the effect is small and not significant, so I wouldn’t put too much weight on it.

sentences.en: Pelicans aren’t drawn any better than other animals.
sentences.zh: 鹈鹕的画法并不比其他动物好多少。

sentences.en: Bicycles aren’t drawn any better than other vehicles.
sentences.zh: 自行车并不比其他车辆更好。

sentences.en: And no lab draws the combination better than its pelicans and bicycles already predict.
sentences.zh: 没有哪个实验室得出的这种组合比鹈鹕和自行车已经预测的更好。

sentences.en: GLM-5.2 comes closest: it has the largest boost on the exact pelican-bicycle cell, and and its first pelican-on-bicycle sample caught my eye.
sentences.zh: GLM-5.2 最接近：它对鹈鹕自行车电池具有最大的增强作用，并且它的第一个鹈鹕自行车样本引起了我的注意。

sentences.en: But the effect is small and not significant, so I wouldn’t put too much weight on it.
sentences.zh: 但效果很小，也不显着，所以我不会太重视它。

content_html_zh:
2026 年 7 月 22 日 - 链接博客

人工智能实验室是鹈鹕最大化吗？ （via）迪伦·卡斯蒂略（Dylan Castillo）的出色作品，他深入探讨了一个经常被思考的问题：人工智能实验室是否一直在刻意训练模型来绘制骑自行车的鹈鹕，以回应我非常不科学的基准。

我过去曾通过测试骑着其他类型车辆的其他动物的模型来随机抽查这一点，但从来没有像迪伦的方法那样严谨。

Dylan 采用 8 只动物 × 6 辆车 = 48 个提示，并通过 7 个不同的模型（GPT-5.6 Terra、Claude Sonnet 5、Gemini 3.5 Flash、Grok 4.5、Qwen3.7-Max、GLM-5.2 和 DeepSeek V4 Pro）各运行 3 次。 然后，他使用 GPT-5.6 Luna 和 Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite 来帮助评估结果。

有一个简洁的过滤器视图用于探索结果：

对于他测试的模型，他找不到 Pelimaxxing 的证据：

自行车上的鹈鹕看起来并没有好多少 实验室并不擅长画鹈鹕 实验室并不擅长画自行车 实验室并不擅长画自行车上的鹈鹕，甚至根据难度进行调整 鹈鹕自行车场景看起来不被记住 [...] 鹈鹕的画法并不比其他动物好多少。 自行车并不比其他车辆更好。 没有哪个实验室得出的这种组合比鹈鹕和自行车已经预测的更好。 GLM-5.2 最接近：它对鹈鹕自行车电池具有最大的增强作用，并且它的第一个鹈鹕自行车样本引起了我的注意。 但效果很小，也不显着，所以我不会太重视它。
